diagrams.title: Linear Queue Array State - Empty
diagrams.description: Shows initialization state of array-based queue
elements: Empty slots shown as boxes with X
Visual indicator: front and rear both point to position before array
diagrams.purpose: Understanding initial queue state before any operations

diagrams.title: Linear Queue After Operations
diagrams.description: Shows queue state after multiple enqueue and dequeue operations
elements: Wasted space visualization at indices 0 and 1
Arrow showing direction of growth: rear moves →
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how queue fills and front advances, demonstrating wasted space issue

diagrams.title: Linear Queue vs Circular Queue Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing queue at capacity in both implementations
elements: Linear: [5][10][15][20][__][__] with rear at index 3, front at 0 - shows wasted indices 4,5 cannot be used
Circular: [5][10][15][20] with front at 0, rear wraps to index 4 - shows efficient space usage
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrating how circular queue efficiently uses available space compared to linear queue
